steps.text: The big hand counts in fives! Every number it lands on is five more. Tap 1 — that is five minutes!
Five! The big hand moved to five minutes past. Tap 2 — five more makes ten!
Ten! Five, ten — counting in fives! Tap 3 — what comes next? Five more than ten is fifteen!
Fifteen! Five, ten, fifteen. The pattern keeps going — always five more. Tap 4 — twenty!
Twenty! Five, ten, fifteen, twenty. Tap 5 — twenty-five!
Twenty-five! Nearly halfway around. Tap 6 — thirty! That is halfway around the whole clock!
steps.feedback: Thirty! Five, ten, fifteen, twenty, twenty-five, thirty — the clock counts in fives, all the way around!
